_comment: TEST-005 (#1165): checked-in baseline for the canonicalization criterion benchmark regression gate (gateway/scripts/check_bench_regression.py). Captured from a local run of `cargo bench --manifest-path gateway/Cargo.toml --bench canon_benchmark` on this sandbox (default sample_size=100, see benches/canon_benchmark.rs). 'mean_ns' is criterion's mean.point_estimate (nanoseconds, from estimates.json) for canonicalization/canonicalize_json_nested_mixed_types. CI hardware will differ from this sandbox, so this baseline should be re-captured from a CI run before the regression gate is relied upon for real PRs; it establishes the mechanism and a starting point.
